---
toc: false
---
:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="40%"}

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| fig-align: center
#| fig-alt: "Course logo with a person icon shuffling five icons one with a bar plot, laptop, data, line plot, and a book. Below the person's icon is a text that reads introdata.science"
knitr::include_graphics("img/logo.png")
```

:::

::: {.column width="5%"}
<!-- empty column to create gap -->
:::

::: {.column width="55%"}

Welcome to **{{< var course.code >}} - {{< var course.long-title >}}** in {{< var course.term >}} {{< var course.year >}}

{{< include specific-content/index/01a-course-description.qmd >}}


:::

::::

<br>
<br>


:::{.jumbotron}

{{< include specific-content/index/01b-course-goals.qmd >}}

:::


{{< include specific-content/index/01c-important-dates.qmd >}}



{{< include specific-content/index/01d-calendar.qmd >}}
